test: P3 Stage-2 LIVE integration (M6/M7) + P2 discharge

annotations.rationale: Introduces why healthcare is at an inflection point, motivating need for new models (lo-g0-009). Bloom=understand to grasp context; role=motivation to prime learners; linked to quiz c035.
Defines innovation mindset and clarifies meaning (lo-g0-001). Bloom=understand; role=definition; assessed in c032.
Expands definition with examples/misconceptions to deepen understanding of innovation mindset (lo-g0-001). Bloom=understand; role=worked_example; assessed in c032.
Motivates importance of the innovation mindset by connecting to practice (lo-g0-001). Bloom=understand; role=motivation; assessed in c032.
Synthesizes how psychological safety and mindsets relate to outcomes (lo-g0-002). Bloom=analyze; role=synthesis; assessed in c033.
Uses a case to analyze effects of safety and mindsets on performance and safety (lo-g0-002). Bloom=analyze; role=worked_example; assessed in c033.
Prompts applied analysis of team scenarios linking safety/mindset to outcomes (lo-g0-002). Bloom=analyze; role=practice; assessed in c033.
Analyzes NHE trends to justify shift from sickcare to proactive systems (lo-g0-008). Bloom=analyze; role=synthesis; assessed in c034.
Applies data to quantify waste and potential savings (lo-g0-006). Bloom=apply; role=worked_example; no dedicated quiz.
Assesses ability to define and correct misconceptions about innovation mindset (lo-g0-001). Bloom=understand; role=assessment.
Assesses analysis of how safety and mindsets affect outcomes (lo-g0-002). Bloom=analyze; role=assessment.
Assesses interpretation of NHE trends and justification for proactive care (lo-g0-008). Bloom=analyze; role=assessment.
Assesses evaluation of the inflection point and need for new leadership/innovation (lo-g0-009). Bloom=evaluate; role=assessment.
